tasks.title: [RED] Ops endpoint tests
tasks.description: Write tests/server/test_ops.py: test GET /health → 200 {status:'ok', module_count:N, uptime_seconds:N}, store unreachable→503 {status:'unhealthy', reason:...}, GET /metrics with metrics=False→404, GET /metrics with metrics=True→200 with counter fields, health exempt from auth

tasks.title: [GREEN] Health + Metrics endpoints
tasks.description: Implement handle_health() and handle_metrics() in TransportManager (src/apcore_a2a/server/transport.py): health always returns 200/503, metrics returns 404 by default or 200 with counters when enabled. Track uptime via time.monotonic() at startup. Counters: active, completed, failed, canceled, requests.

tasks.title: [RED] Dynamic registration tests
tasks.description: Write tests/server/test_ops.py (part 2): test register_module() — adds module to registry, invalidates Agent Card cache, rebuilt card includes new skill, Agent Card cache returns stale until invalidated

tasks.title: [GREEN] Dynamic registration implementation
tasks.description: Implement A2AServerFactory.register_module() in src/apcore_a2a/server/factory.py and AgentCardBuilder.invalidate_cache() in adapters/agent_card.py: register new module in registry, invalidate cached cards, rebuild Agent Card, update TransportManager reference

tasks.title: [REFACTOR] Ops cleanup
